title: Recoverability of Schedules Decision Flowchart
description: A flowchart that visually guides the classification of a database schedule based on its recoverability characteristics.
relationships: Start with a Schedule. Check if a transaction reads data written by an uncommitted transaction. If yes and it commits first, it's Irrecoverable. If it waits, it's Recoverable. From Recoverable, check if transactions only read committed data to be Cascadeless. Further check if transactions read AND write only committed data to be Strict.
